title: selaginella lepidophylla
intro: Selaginella lepidophylla, also known as the resurrection plant, is a type of spore-producing plant that has adapted to survive in arid conditions, allowing it to remain dormant for long periods of time. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella lepidophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, powder, or capsule, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions.
